summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HVAC/Generator category separation (iteration 20). All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend verification confirmed category toggle, KPI filtering, EditLeadModal adaptations, and dual lead (also_generator) functionality working correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: API health check returns 200
Backend: Benjamin login returns salesperson role
Backend: Franco login returns salesperson role
Backend: Admin login returns admin role
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/kpis?category=hvac - Benjamin: 77 visits, 30 deals, $348,850, 39% R%
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/kpis?category=generator - Benjamin: 1 visit, 0 deals, $0
Backend: GET /api/leads?category=generator - Benjamin: 1 lead (MARIA MEDINA)
Backend: GET /api/dashboard/kpis?category=hvac - Franco: 65 visits, 29 deals, $357,043, 44.6% R%
Backend: GET /api/leads?category=generator - Franco: 6 leads (ZOUP, PAUL, FRED FLUDE dual, VANESSA, DAVID BERRY, CARL)
Backend: Dual leads (also_generator=true) appear in HVAC view (FRED FLUDE unit_type=Furnace)
Backend: Dual leads (also_generator=true) appear in Generator view
Backend: Admin comparison with category=hvac excludes Generator from equipment_types
Backend: Admin comparison with category=generator returns correct totals
Backend: GET /api/leads?category=hvac excludes pure Generator leads
Backend: GET /api/leads?category=generator returns only Generator + also_generator leads
Backend: Pipeline follow_ups only contain PENDING status
Backend: Tasks endpoint returns correct data
Backend: Non-PENDING leads have no follow_up_date (iteration 19 verification)
Frontend: Benjamin login + Dashboard loads with HVAC by default
Frontend: Category toggle visible below tabs (HVAC/Generators)
Frontend: HVAC Dashboard shows correct KPIs (39% R%, $348,850, 77 leads, 30 deals)
Frontend: Generator Dashboard shows correct KPIs (1 lead, 0 deals, $0)
Frontend: Status tab with HVAC shows HVAC leads only (no Generator unit_type)
Frontend: Status tab with Generators shows 1 generator lead (MARIA MEDINA)
Frontend: Generator EditLeadModal has green header 'Generator Appointment'
Frontend: Generator EditLeadModal has NO SPIFF section
Frontend: HVAC EditLeadModal shows 'Also includes Generator' checkbox
Frontend: Franco Generator view shows all 6 leads including FRED FLUDE (dual)
Frontend: Admin category toggle visible
Frontend: Admin Overview shows HVAC totals ($705,893 revenue, 59 closed deals)
Frontend: Admin Overview Equipment Breakdown excludes Generator for HVAC
Frontend: Admin Salespeople tab works for both HVAC and Generator categories
Frontend: Admin All Data tab shows 7 generator leads total
critical_code_review_comments: Good: Category filter in dashboard.py correctly uses $or for generator (line 24): unit_type=Generator OR also_generator=true
Good: Category filter in leads.py mirrors dashboard filter logic
Good: Admin comparison endpoint in admin.py correctly filters by category
Good: Frontend activeCategory state properly passed to all API calls (fetchDashboardData, fetchAllLeads)
Good: EditLeadModal correctly detects generator leads using isGeneratorLead() helper from constants.js
Good: EditLeadModal hides SPIFF section for generator leads (line 540: spiffSum = isGen ? 0 : ...)
Good: EditLeadModal shows 'Also includes Generator' checkbox only for HVAC leads (line 657-666)
Good: SaleConversionModal uses GENERATOR_MANUFACTURER_OPTIONS (Generac/Kohler) for generators
Good: isGeneratorLead() function in constants.js handles 'generator', 'generac', 'kohler' variants
context_for_next_testing_agent: Category toggle (HVAC/Generators) is now functional. HVAC filter excludes Generator unit_type. Generator filter uses $or: [unit_type=Generator, also_generator=true]. FRED FLUDE is a dual lead appearing in both views. EditLeadModal adapts header color and hides SPIFFs for generators. SaleConversionModal shows Generac/Kohler options for generators. Closing rate is calculated using visit_date. Default date filter is current_year.
